failedAssertions.reason: Resolver does not accept 14-digit padded GTIN in URL for DB lookup. DB stores original 13-digit GTIN; resolver uses raw URL param without normalization. GET /01/00012345678905/... returns 404 while GET /01/0012345678905/... returns 200. The response output correctly pads to 14 digits (digitalLink, @id, gs1:gtin), but the lookup path is broken for padded input.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Mint route uses requireRole('BRAND_ADMIN') which does not include ADMIN role. No BRAND_ADMIN test account was available with suitable permissions. The transaction-based race condition fix exists in code (Prisma $transaction with conditional updateMany) but cannot be exercised through the API with available credentials. Fix: add 'ADMIN' to mint route's requireRole call.
